heroSubtitle: Turn your smartphone into a wireless trackpad and keyboard for your PC
featuresSubtitle: Control your PC from your phone with these powerful features
featureTrackpadDesc: Smooth cursor control with tap, drag, scroll, and multi-touch gestures.
featureKeyboardDesc: Full keyboard with function keys, shortcuts, and modifier keys like Ctrl and Alt.
featureMediaDesc: Play, pause, skip tracks, and adjust volume directly from your phone.
featureSystemDesc: Lock, restart, sleep, or shut down your PC remotely with a single tap.
featureClipboardDesc: Copy, paste, cut, undo, redo, and open Task Manager from your phone.
featureFnKeysDesc: Full F1-F12 keys, number pad, and customizable key combinations.
connectSubtitle: Follow these simple steps to start controlling your PC
step1Desc: Download the Windows installer and run the server application on your PC.
step2Desc: The server displays your PC's IP address and port in the terminal window.
step3Desc: Install the Remote Controller APK on your Android device.
step4Desc: Open the app, enter the IP address shown in the terminal, and you're ready to go.
